name: Kotn
description: Canadian brand crafting everyday basics from 100% Egyptian cotton, ethically made in Egypt, Portugal, and Turkey.

products.name: Women's Curved Hem 3/4 Sleeve
products.description: Midweight jersey tee with boatneck and flared sleeves in 100% Egyptian cotton.

products.name: Women's Shortsleeve Cardigan
products.description: Micro rib short-sleeve cardigan in 100% Egyptian cotton, perfect for layering.

products.name: Women's Set Tank
products.description: Ribbed tank in Egyptian cotton with a hint of stretch, modern scoop neckline.

products.name: Women's Solis Ribbed Knit 2-in-1
products.description: Versatile two-piece set with fitted cami and bolero in 100% EcoVero Viscose, made in Portugal.

products.name: Women's Twisted Seam Long Denim Short
products.description: Relaxed baggy-fit denim shorts in 100% cotton with signature twisted seams, made in Turkey.
